methods.description: Process for calculating CpG methylation using a commercial bioinformatic pipeline to reconstruct probabilities of methylation at CpG sites.

steps.description: Samples were co-assembled within IDBA with the same parameters described above.
steps.searchable_summary: assemble samples using IDBA with specified parameters

steps.description: The methylation score metrics recovered from assembled IDBA contigs are based on independent characteristics of DNA fragmentation via HpaII restriction digest and random shearing.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate methylation score metrics from IDBA contigs

steps.description: Computational reconstruction of CpG methylation is based on a null selection model.
steps.searchable_summary: reconstruct CpG methylation using null selection model

methods.description: Statistical procedures used to analyze community methylation scores using R statistical package.

steps.description: Modalities were tested with Hartigans' dip test for unimodality.
steps.searchable_summary: test modalities with Hartigans' dip test

steps.description: Methylation score bootstrap standard errors (SE) and coefficients of variation (CV) were estimated (n = 10,000).
steps.searchable_summary: estimate bootstrap SE and CV for methylation scores

steps.description: Score variances were tested with a Brown-Forsythe Levene-type test.
steps.searchable_summary: test score variances with Brown-Forsythe Levene-type test

steps.description: Normality was tested with the Shapiro-Wilk test.
Two-tailed Jonckheere-Terpstra trend tests were performed with 10,000-permutation reference distributions for downcore depth trends.
steps.searchable_summary: perform Jonckheere-Terpstra trend tests for depth trends

steps.description: Kruskal-Wallis H tests were used to determine if CpG site methylation distributions were identical across depths for chitinase and transposase genes.
steps.searchable_summary: perform Kruskal-Wallis H tests for methylation distributions

methods.method_name: 16S rRNA Gene Amplicon Sequencing and Analysis
methods.description: Preparation and sequencing of 16S rRNA gene amplicons from sediment core sections, followed by sequence analysis using QIIME.

steps.description: Universal 16S rRNA gene amplicons were prepared from HpaIIdigested sediment core section gDNA using primers 515F/806R.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare 16S rRNA gene amplicons using specific primers

steps.description: Sequencing was performed on an IonTorrent PGM.
steps.searchable_summary: sequence 16S rRNA amplicons using IonTorrent PGM

steps.description: Analysis of 16S rRNA gene sequences was performed with QIIME 1.8.0.
Dereplication, abundance sorting, and discarding reads less than 200 bp was performed with the USEARCH7 algorithm.
steps.searchable_summary: perform dereplication and abundance sorting with USEARCH7

steps.description: Chimeras were filtered with UCHIME using the RDP Gold Classifier training database v9.
Operational taxonomic unit (OTU) picking was performed at 97% similarity with UCLUST.
steps.searchable_summary: perform OTU picking with UCLUST at 97% similarity

steps.description: Taxonomic assignments were performed with UCLUST using the Greengenes V13.8 database for 97% OTUs.
steps.searchable_summary: assign taxonomy using UCLUST and Greengenes database
